title: hedychium coccineum var. angustifolium
intro: Hedychium coccineum var. angustifolium, also known as narrow-leaved ginger lily, is a plant species within the ginger family, characterized by its narrow, dark green leaves and vibrant red flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Hedychium coccineum var. angustifolium include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as potentially treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or dried flower infusion for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
